languages.original_text: "He must be confident enough in his own impunity that he does not deem the Rogue Traders of the Koronus Expanse to be a threat. I cannot discern if this is down to recklessness, or if it is a sign of extreme power."

languages.text: "Вероятно, он достаточно уверен в собственной безнаказанности, чтобы не воспринимать Вольных Торговцев Простора Коронус как угрозу. Не могу понять, опрометчивость это, или признак крайнего могущества".

"He must be confident enough in his own impunity that he does not deem the Rogue Traders of the Koronus Expanse to be a threat. I cannot discern if this is down to recklessness, or if it is a sign of extreme power."
languages.original_text: "Вероятно, он достаточно уверен в собственной безнаказанности, чтобы не воспринимать Вольных Торговцев Простора Коронус как угрозу. Не могу понять, опрометчивость это, или признак крайнего могущества".

traits.locale_text: "He must be confident enough in his own impunity that he does not deem the Rogue Traders of the Koronus Expanse to be a threat. I cannot discern if this is down to recklessness, or if it is a sign of extreme power."

"He must be confident enough in his own impunity that he does not deem the Rogue Traders of the Koronus Expanse to be a threat. I cannot discern if this is down to recklessness, or if it is a sign of extreme power."

"He must be confident enough in his own impunity that he does not deem the Rogue Traders of the Koronus Expanse to be a threat. I cannot discern if this is down to recklessness, or if it is a sign of extreme power."

languages.text: 「彼は自分の無罪を確信しているのでしょう。彼にとって、コロナス・エクスパンスのならず者たちは脅威ではないのでしょう。これは無謀さなのか、それとも極限の力によるものなのか、私にはわかりません」
languages.original_text: "He must be confident enough in his own impunity that he does not deem the Rogue Traders of the Koronus Expanse to be a threat. I cannot discern if this is down to recklessness, or if it is a sign of extreme power."

traits.locale_text: 「彼は自分の無罪を確信しているのでしょう。彼にとって、コロナス・エクスパンションのならず者たちは脅威ではないのでしょう。これは無謀さなのか、それとも極限の力によるものなのか、私にはわかりません。」

languages.text: « Il doit être persuadé qu'il peut agir en toute impunité s'il ne considère pas les libres-marchands des Étendues de Koronus comme une menace. Je me demande s'il faut y voir de l'inconscience ou le signe d'un immense pouvoir. »
languages.original_text: "He must be confident enough in his own impunity that he does not deem the Rogue Traders of the Koronus Expanse to be a threat. I cannot discern if this is down to recklessness, or if it is a sign of extreme power."

traits.locale_text: « Il doit être persuadé qu'il peut agir en toute impunité s'il ne considère pas les libres-marchands des Étendues de Koronus comme une menace. Je me demande s'il faut y voir de l'inconscience ou le signe d'un immense pouvoir. »

languages.text: "Er muss sich seiner Straflosigkeit so sicher sein, dass er die Freihändler der Koronus-Ausdehnung nicht als Bedrohung erachtet. Ich vermag nicht zu sagen, ob es sich dabei um Leichtsinn oder ein Zeichen extremer Macht handelt."
languages.original_text: "He must be confident enough in his own impunity that he does not deem the Rogue Traders of the Koronus Expanse to be a threat. I cannot discern if this is down to recklessness, or if it is a sign of extreme power."

traits.locale_text: "Er muss sich seiner Straflosigkeit so sicher sein, dass er die Freihändler der Koronus-Ausdehnung nicht als Bedrohung erachtet. Ich vermag nicht zu sagen, ob es sich dabei um Leichtsinn oder ein Zeichen extremer Macht handelt."

languages.text: "Kendi dokunulmazlığına o kadar güveniyor olmalı ki Koronus Enginliği'nin Hür Tacirlerini bir tehdit olarak görmüyor. Bunun pervasızlık mı yoksa aşırı gücün bir işareti mi olduğunu kestiremiyorum."
languages.original_text: "He must be confident enough in his own impunity that he does not deem the Rogue Traders of the Koronus Expanse to be a threat. I cannot discern if this is down to recklessness, or if it is a sign of extreme power."

traits.locale_text: "Kendi dokunulmazlığına o kadar güveniyor olmalı ki Koronus Enginliği'nin Hür Tacirlerini bir tehdit olarak görmüyor. Bunun pervasızlık mı yoksa aşırı gücün bir işareti mi olduğunu kestiremiyorum."

languages.text: «Mucho debe de confiar en su propia impunidad para no considerar una amenaza a los Comerciantes Independientes de la Extensión de Koronus. No termino de decidir si es una temeridad o bien un indicio de un poder inconmensurable».
languages.original_text: "He must be confident enough in his own impunity that he does not deem the Rogue Traders of the Koronus Expanse to be a threat. I cannot discern if this is down to recklessness, or if it is a sign of extreme power."

traits.locale_text: «Mucho debe de confiar en su propia impunidad para no considerar una amenaza a los Comerciantes Independientes de la Extensión de Koronus. No termino de decidir si es una temeridad o bien un indicio de un poder inconmensurable».

languages.text: “他定是自恃持有免受处罚的特权，才不把科罗努斯扩区的行商浪人放在眼里。我无法判断这究竟是出于狂妄，还是极致实力的体现。”
languages.original_text: "He must be confident enough in his own impunity that he does not deem the Rogue Traders of the Koronus Expanse to be a threat. I cannot discern if this is down to recklessness, or if it is a sign of extreme power."

traits.locale_text: “他定是自恃持有免受处罚的特权，才不把科罗努斯扩区的行商浪人放在眼里。我无法判断这究竟是出于狂妄，还是极致实力的体现。”
